programmes.show_description: A young girl is the only witness to the death of the detective questioning her. She tells Mulder and Scully that someone else was in the room.
Top scientists at an aeronautics research lab die under mysterious circumstances, with a mentally handicapped janitor the only other person around.
Working on a tip-off from Deep Throat, Mulder and Scully discover a strange case involving the cloning of extra-terrestrial viruses.
When the X-Files project is officially disbanded, Mulder and Scully can hardly contain their boredom and set about solving a new mystery involving UFOs.

Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Jim and his team face a tricky task when two artics crash on the foggy M1 causing five-mile-long tailback.
Following those who take on super-sized transport jobs. Steve and the team find themselves in deep water when they attempt to recover a crashed car from a river.
Classic western starring John Wayne and Dean Martin. A border town falls under the grip of an evil cattle baron and his psychopathic brother. (1959)

The Class of '92 - Ronnie O'Sullivan, John Higgins and Mark Williams - are joined by King of the Crucible, Stephen Hendry in a unique four-player tournament, live from the Goffs Arena, Ireland.
A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest.
A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift.
A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.
Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck, but the owner says otherwise.
Ronnie O'Sullivan, John Higgins and Mark Williams are joined by the King of the Crucible, Stephen Hendry in a unique four-player tournament which reaches its final.
Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems.
A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details.
Patrol officer Nick Garruto heads off in hot pursuit of car thieves. Patrolman Matt Rugel deals with a driver who's had one too many margaritas.
A young mother addicted to crack cocaine takes her daughter on a risky drug smuggling job in Venezuela, but her world collapses when the two are torn apart.
A troubled young father learns a hard lesson chasing a gangster lifestyle when he is set up as a decoy on a smuggling trip from Peru.
On a mission to find drug labs in the Colombian jungle, Keith Stansell crashes. He's kidnapped by FARC guerrillas and held hostage for over five years.
Twenty-eight-year-old Canadian Tabitha Ritchie's life took a terrifying turn when she was caught smuggling drugs out of Colombia.

programmes.show_description: Western with Henry Fonda. A mysterious stranger teams up with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow and her land from a ruthless assassin in the employ of a railroad tycoon. (1969)

A loader malfunctions, causing chaos on the landing as Craig and Taylor struggle to move the 65-tonne winch. Meanwhile, the Glovers move to a new block on Erie Mountain.
The firearms team are called in as an elderly couple may be involved in attempted murder. A mysterious traffic incident sees a car upside down and on fire.
The Road Crimes Team pursue a 4x4 connected to fuel theft, interceptors battle to stop a dangerous driver a stolen lorry, and firearms cops are forced to use their big red key.
Lisa and Lewis tackle a troublesome lad with a potty mouth, followed by a trip to the canal, where a member of the public has heard gunshots.
Multiple units race to catch a group of potential car thieves. And police respond to a 999 call about a motorbike driving the wrong way into oncoming traffic.
The heavy rescue crew tackles their toughest recovery so far this season when they have to pull a smashed SUV up a sheer 400-metre cliff.
The dangers of driving in severe snowfalls, including a pile-up involving 50 vehicles during blizzard conditions in Ontario. Plus, the fallout from risks taken on our fastest roads.
Mulder and Scully investigate the death of a sanitation worker. Performing the autopsy, Scully discovers a strange worm-like creature inside the corpse.
